// // This module decrements a 4-bit binary counter on the rising edge of the clock signal. The counter can be incremented to zero when the reset input is asserted. Additionally, the counter will only decrement when the enable input is high and the current count is greater than 0.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable && count != 4'b1111) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
